name: Mediterranean Chicken and Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: chicken breast halves, cooked and shredded

method: Place pasta, chicken, tomatoes, bell pepper, red onion, basil, olives, capers and pine nuts in a large bowl.
Prepare the dressing by whisking lemon juice, garlic, olive oil, and salt. Pour the dressing over the salad, toss to
This recipe is perfect for summertime because it uses fresh vegetables and fruits that are in season. The following
ingredients can be found at your local grocery store: romaine lettuce, tomatoes, black beans (or pinto beans),
avocado, lime wedges, and salsa. It is an easy recipe that will make a great addition to any meal.
